variables.name: Specific heat capacity
variables.description: Energy required to raise the temperature of 1 kg of a substance by 1 degree.

variables.name: Latent heat
variables.description: Energy required for a phase change without temperature change.

variables.name: Heat energy
variables.description: Thermal energy transferred to or from a substance.

variables.name: Final temperature
variables.description: Temperature of the substance after heat transfer.

variables.name: Initial temperature
variables.description: Temperature of the substance before heat transfer.
